title: Deathlink
description: Experience the ultimate convenience in the world of Minecraft with Deathlink! Say goodbye to frustrating treks back to your death point after a fatal mishap
body:
Experience the ultimate convenience in the world of Minecraft with Deathlink! Say goodbye to frustrating treks back to your death point after a fatal mishap. With Deathlink, you gain the power to instantly teleport to your exact death location, eliminating the hassle and saving you valuable time.

Features include:

 

Deathpoint Teleportation: Upon perishing in the vast Minecraft world, Deathlink provides a seamless solution by offering a item to teleport you directly back to the spot where your last breath was taken.

 

Recovery: No more endless journeys or frustrating searches to retrieve your lost items. Deathlink ensures a quick and efficient retrieval process, allowing you to reclaim your hard-earned loot effortlessly. 

 

Strategic Gameplay: With the ability to teleport to your death point, you can take bolder risks, explore dangerous territories, and engage in challenging encounters without the fear of permanently losing progress. Deathlink encourages you to push your limits and embrace the adventurous spirit of Minecraft.

 

 

To customize the wait time for the soulport stone just go into the config named :(Deathlink_wait_config) and change the number , the number is in seconds so setting it to 5 delays it for 5 seconds 

 

You can also change the config named ( Deathlink_item_config ) if the value in the config is set to 1 then the player will recieve a Soulport Stone upon respawning, if the value is to 0 the player will not recieve a Soulport Stone upon respawning
